exploration_notes: The Kafka ProduceRequest path is traced through five files, all within the kafka repo. (1) KafkaProducer.send() accepts a ProducerRecord and callback, serializes the key/value, and calls RecordAccumulator.append(). (2) RecordAccumulator.append() batches records into per-partition queues. (3) Sender.sendProducerData() (called from the Sender I/O thread's run loop) drains ready batches from the accumulator and builds ProduceRequests. (4) NetworkClient.send() enqueues the request for transmission o
